message:
test(connectors): expand ClickUp (+40), GitLab (+38), BigQuery (+41) test suites to 160+

Add BigQuery to workspace members. Expand unit tests across client, connector,
error, and types modules for all three connectors covering auth edge cases,
DoctorResult serde roundtrips, operations_info validation, require_str edge
cases, Debug/Clone traits, retryability boundaries, and to_fcp_error mapping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -107,6 +107,7 @@ members = [
     "connectors/terraform",
     "connectors/annas-archive",
     "connectors/make",
+    "connectors/bigquery",
 ]
 
 # Default to the FCP2 platform core crates (connectors are explicitly targeted).
